description: Default field values deep-merged into every server, service, and DNS record before processing. Loaded into local.defaults alongside data/config.yml.
title: Defaults

credentials.description: Default shapes for credential field entries. Merged into each field declaration so only overrides need to be specified.

ro.description: Default shape for read-only credential fields bootstrapped by a provider and read back from 1Password.

bootstrap_length.description: Null in the default; overridden per-field when bootstrap_type is set.

bootstrap_type.description: Null in the default; overridden per-field to hex, base64, string, or alphanumeric.

mode.description: Read-only: value is written from a provider-generated secret.

type.description: 1Password field type when purpose is not set.

rw.description: Default shape for read-write credential fields written to 1Password for manual entry and read back at apply time.

bootstrap_length.description: Null in the default; overridden per-field when bootstrap_type is set.

bootstrap_type.description: Null in the default; overridden per-field to hex, base64, string, or alphanumeric.

mode.description: Read-write: value may be supplied or overridden via 1Password.

type.description: 1Password field type when purpose is not set.

dns.description: Default values merged into all auto-generated DNS records. Individual records may override these.

priority.description: Default MX/SRV record priority. Null omits the field for non-priority record types.

proxied.description: Whether to proxy records through Cloudflare by default. Individual service records override this based on their routing.expose setting.

ttl.description: Default DNS TTL in seconds. Use 1 for Cloudflare's automatic TTL.

wildcard.description: Whether to create a wildcard CNAME (*.hostname → hostname) alongside each auto-generated A/AAAA/CNAME record by default.

servers.description: Default field values deep-merged into every server definition before processing. Keys mirror the server schema.

services.description: Default field values deep-merged into every service definition before processing. Keys mirror the service schema (excluding `targets`, which carries per-deployment data only).

targets.description: Per-platform defaults merged into each service deployment target during expansion (services_input.tf).

truenas.description: Defaults for TrueNAS catalog app deployments.
